title: amaryllis minima
intro: Amaryllis minima, also known as the small amaryllis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Amaryllis minima include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. Amaryllis minima can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and relieve symptoms of various health conditions.
